---
title: "Margaret Percival By the author of Amy Herbert etc.  Edited by the Rev. William Sewell"
---

## Margaret Percival By the author of Amy Herbert etc.  Edited by the Rev. William Sewell

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1847
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
